## Overseas Funding Compliance Declaration
## 海外资金合规申报

> **Trigger:** Open this issue for any overseas donation that:
> - Exceeds **NZD 1,500** in a single transaction, OR
> - Brings the cumulative total from this overseas source above **NZD 5,000** in any 12-month period.

**Treasurer Responsible / 负责财务官:**
**Date of Receipt / 收款日期:**
**Overseas Funding Register Reference / 海外资金登记册编号:** OFR-____-____

---

### Section 1 — Donor Information
### 第1部分 — 捐助方信息

- **Donor Full Name / 捐助方全名:**
- **Donor Country / 捐助方国家:**
- **Donor Type / 捐助方类型:** ☐ Individual ☐ Company ☐ Foundation ☐ Government ☐ Other:______
- **Relationship to HCCA or any member / 与HCCA或成员的关系:**
- **Amount (NZD equivalent) / 金额（新西兰元等值）:** NZD
- **Currency and exchange rate used / 货币及使用的汇率:**
- **Payment method / 支付方式:** ☐ Bank transfer ☐ Cheque ☐ Other:______
- **Stated purpose of donation / 捐款声明用途:**

---

### Section 2 — AML/CFT Self-Assessment
### 第2部分 — 反洗钱/反恐融资自查

- [ ] Donor identity documents sighted and verified
- [ ] Donor is NOT from a FATF high-risk jurisdiction
- [ ] Donor is NOT a Politically Exposed Person (PEP) or connected to a PEP
- [ ] No unusual features (unsolicited large donation, unusual payment method, request to pass funds to third party)
- [ ] Source of funds is consistent with donor's known profile
- [ ] Donation purpose is consistent with HCCA's charitable purposes
- [ ] No grounds for suspicion of money laundering or terrorist financing

**If ANY of the above checks reveal a concern, do NOT accept the funds until the full Committee has reviewed and legal advice has been obtained.**

---

### Section 3 — Committee Approval (if required)
### 第3部分 — 理事会批准（如需）

Is Committee approval required? ☐ Yes (donation triggers enhanced review) ☐ No

- [ ] Matter raised with Committee
- [ ] Committee resolution date: ________________
- [ ] Committee resolved to: ☐ Accept ☐ Decline ☐ Accept with conditions: _____________
- [ ] Interested officers recused from decision: ________________

---

### Section 4 — Recording and Reporting
### 第4部分 — 记录与报告

- [ ] Entry added to Overseas Funding Register (Ref: OFR-____-____)
- [ ] Funds received into HCCA bank account (NOT any personal account)
- [ ] Annual Report disclosure noted: ☐ Yes — to be included in next Annual Report
- [ ] No funds distributed to members as personal financial gain

---

### Section 5 — Financial Isolation Confirmation
### 第5部分 — 财务隔离确认

- [ ] Funds deposited into HCCA dedicated bank account
- [ ] Expenditure of these funds will require dual signatory approval (>NZD 500)
- [ ] Expenditure of these funds >NZD 2,000 will require Committee resolution

---

**Treasurer sign-off / 财务官签字:** ______________________
**Date / 日期:** ______________________
**President / Committee Member sign-off / 主席/理事会成员确认:** ______________________

*Reference: [Overseas Funding Rules](../../finance_&_funding/overseas_funding_rules.md)*
